creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
The web site www.bsdcon.com (alias www.bsdcon.org) is 
dead.

Fix: 

Contact Wind River Systems and ask why the host is down.

The real home page for BSDCON is 
http://www.usenix.org/events/bsdcon02
so www.bsdcon.org should be a simple virtual webserver
with a redirect to the real home page.

IMHO the domains should be maintained by the FreeBSD Project
or an other non-profit organization (FreeBSD Foundation, Usenix).

BTW, the domains bsdcon.com and bsdcon.org 
expires in 3 weeks!
